overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character walking through a misty alien meadow with bioluminescent red flowers, approaching a village with organic tent structures. The character passes another Na'vi standing in the field before entering the village and exploring the interior with hanging cookware and campfires.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien meadow with red wildflowers approaching settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass and red flowers toward distant stone structures

entered.detail: large rock formations suspended in the misty sky with waterfalls
stacked stone monument with cascading water behind it
tall twisted rock formation rising from the field
dense growth of red bioluminescent wildflowers
large organic village structures with red leaf-like canopies

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a misty alien meadow filled with tall green grass and patches of red bioluminescent flowers. In the distance, floating mountains loom above a stone cairn structure with a waterfall, while organic Na'vi village tents become visible on the right horizon.

events.description: Na'vi character comes into view standing in the grass ahead
camera approaches and passes the standing Na'vi character

agents.ego_description: approaching a standing Na'vi character and passing by them on the right side

notable_agents.action: standing still facing the camera, then turning to watch as camera passes by

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a blue-skinned Na'vi character standing in the tall grass. As the camera passes the character, the stone structures fall behind and the village tents grow larger on the right, indicating the entrance to the settlement is near.

scene_state.functional_zone: Na'vi village entrance under organic canopy

events.description: entering the Na'vi village area under large organic tent structures

agents.ego_description: walking under the large red canopy of the Na'vi village entrance, approaching the interior

entered.detail: large curved structure made of woven branches with red leaf-like roofing material
small burning fire pit with smoke rising
woven storage containers suspended from the tent frame

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Na'vi village, moving under a massive organic canopy made of woven branches and red leaves. The open field gives way to a sheltered space with campfires burning and woven baskets hanging from the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of Na'vi communal dwelling with hanging cookware

events.description: camera pans to reveal more of the village interior including hanging cooking pots and seated figures

agents.ego_description: moving through the village interior, observing the woven structures, campfires, and hanging cookware

notable_agents.action: Na'vi figure sitting near a campfire in the background

entered.detail: black metal pots suspended from the tent frame for cooking
red and blue patterned textiles covering the ground
clusters of purple blossoms growing near the tent poles

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the village interior, the camera reveals hanging cooking pots, woven floor mats, and purple flowering bushes. The space is sheltered by the organic canopy overhead, with campfires burning in the background and a Na'vi figure visible sitting near one of the fires.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, open alien meadow into the sheltered interior of a Na'vi village. It begins by gliding through tall green grass and red bioluminescent flowers, with floating mountains and a waterfall looming in the distance as organic tents appear on the horizon. As the camera passes a blue-skinned Na'vi standing in the field, the stone structures recede and the settlement entrance grows larger. The scene then shifts from the open landscape into the village, moving under a massive canopy of woven branches and red leaves where campfires and woven baskets replace the meadow. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the sheltered space, revealing hanging cooking pots, purple flowering bushes, and a Na'vi figure resting by a fire.
